form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.46) when fourth over 340m at Hobart in a Grade 4. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 1. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (19.46) when fourth over 340m at Hobart in a Grade 4. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 1. Looks a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped, was severely checked and raced wide.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.35) at Hobart in a Grade 4, finishing seventh and beaten 13 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from nine starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.3 lengths second at Hobart but did record a slick 19.49 over the 340m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.14) at Hobart in a Other, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Has one win and four placings from 10 starts from the draw. Among the chances on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped and was checked; Raced wide.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 278m in 16.12. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 340m at Hobart at Grade 5 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd over 340m at Hobart beaten 0.8 lengths (19.46) behind Brother's Keeper in a Other on February 5. Needs further improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (16.31) over 278m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, hard to recommend this time.
